---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for QueueForge
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the proposed feature.

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I find it difficult to...")

## Proposed Solution
Provide a clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or diagrams about the feature request here.
